prompt: A hyper-detailed premium holographic trading card illustration of Kamen Rider 1, designed like an ultra-rare tokusatsu collectible card with a vertical full-frame ornate border. The central figure is a classic masked hero in a dynamic forward-reaching pose, filling most of the composition from thighs up, with one gloved hand thrust toward the viewer and the other hand holding a smaller version of the same card. He wears a dark green armored chest, black suit, silver segmented gloves and forearms, a red scarf streaming dramatically to the right, a red belt with a large circular red buckle, and a metallic insect-like helmet with 2 long silver antennae and 2 oversized faceted crimson compound eyes. Behind him is a chaotic apocalyptic city battle scene at night with ruined buildings, smoke, sparks, streaking explosions, and a star-filled cosmic sky. Include exactly 10 smaller rider figures in the background and corners: 2 flying in the upper right sky, 1 climbing or leaping on the mid-left ruins, 3 mid-background combat figures across the center-right, 2 small figures in the lower right, 1 blue-accented figure in the lower left, and 1 partially visible figure near the far left edge. The art style is gritty, painterly, metallic, and cinematic, with dense glitter particles, rainbow foil reflections, gold filigree linework, and prism-like holographic highlights across the entire image. The card frame should be lavish black, gold, and iridescent foil with collectible-game styling. At the top center place the text "MASKED RIDER" above large serif text "KAMEN RIDER" and a huge gold number "1". In the top left place a circular emblem showing the masked rider face. In the top right place a large badge reading "SSR" with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the bottom left place a panel reading "CARD TYPE" and "CHARACTER". At the bottom center place the text "KAMEN RIDER 1" with "仮面ライダー1号" below it, and a barcode-like strip with the text "RIDER LEGEND 1971". In the bottom right add a large gold cursive autograph reading "NickZag". Make the whole card feel like an ultra-premium chase card, dramatic perspective, extreme detail, sharp contrast, glowing embers, shattered-city energy, and luxurious holographic foil texture.
